reconnectTime_tooltip: Time in seconds to wait before trying to reconnect to the server (min: 3s)
dataReductionHint: Disable subtrees you don't need. Disabled subtrees are removed on adapter start and no longer updated. controls/ and light/ are always kept.
enableSysinfo_tooltip: System info from the Hyperion server (host, OS, CPU, memory, …). Many states.
enableServerinfo_tooltip: Server info: components, effects, LED metadata, hyperion config. Many states.
enableDescription_tooltip: Static SSDP/UPnP description fields. Rarely needed at runtime.
enableInstances_tooltip: Per-instance subtrees with their own controls/light. Disable if you only use the default Hyperion instance.
